name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- Added Tools~/McpSmokeRegression/Run-McpSmokeRegression.ps1, a repeatable MCP stdio smoke regression runner for live Unity projects. It validates tool discovery, ping, console, editor readiness, ValidateScript, AssetIntelligence ReadText, ContextSnapshot, SceneObjectView, WorkflowRecipes, refresh/compile reload boundaries, compilation diagnostics, and final console health with a JSON report and non-zero exit code on failure.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence accepts Action=ReadText as a natural alias for Action=Read.
- Split UniBridge_Script validation internals into ManageScript.Validation.cs so the legacy script router is easier to maintain without changing script validation behavior.
- Added a shared ProjectPathResolver used by high-risk path workflows so Assets, Packages, ProjectSettings, file URIs, and absolute project paths resolve consistently.
